target:
I don't care about me!
Get behind me quickly…!

From Mio… blood… blood…!
This… I… did this…!?
(Is it from the shock of shooting Mio…?)

That's why…
I immediately knew what Tokiko was planning…

You went and did something reckless…
I'm sorry, Shin-chan…

Don't worry about it!
Stop forcing yourself to talk!

But… there's no other way…
Whenever I do something…
Tokiko would always stop me…

Because of that…
I ended up like this…

I hate it, Mio!
Don't leave me behind!!

I'm sorry for making you sad…
But I'm happy I could hear your true feelings…

Mio! You're lying, right, Mio!?
Open your eyes, Mioooo!!!

Don't look like that.
It wasn't us who did it.

You know, Mio-chan was brave.
You got lucky, Shinpei-kun.

But thanks to that, I saw something nice.
Friendship is such a precious thing.

To regain your sanity after a friend's death… 
What a touching scene.
Oh, what about the Shadow Mio?

Hey, why can't you move?
Someone pull out the nail from Mio-chan.

Ow…!
Be more careful when you pull it out.

That's what Tokiko-chan said.
Good for you.

The real one that was here,
You killed her completely,
So from now on, she's the real one.

How long are you going to dawdle?
I'm getting bored.
Come on, you're bored? Tokiko-chan already disappeared.

It's fine, really.
She was already useless.

We kept our promise,
But you betrayed us.

You idiot.
I was going to let you be with Mio…
But you ruined it.

That's unfortunate.
But as a piece to push you, 
She did her job well, right?

Even if I die,
I'll never…
A knife flew and hit Shinpei's nail gun!

Your only weapon is gone now.
What are you going to do, Shin-chan?

It's your fault, Shin-chan.
You ignored me.

This is mine.
Don't touch it.
So… what are you going to do?

Become a shadow,
Or go to the same place as Hizuru…

We're very generous.
Choose whichever you like.

Huhuhu…
So, what will you do?

(Don't give up—bird's-eye view!
Take the bird's-eye view…!!)

(Nagumo-sensei, Nezu, Totsumura,
Koyumiba… they've all been taken…)

(There's Shide and Haine in front of me,
Plus the Shadow Mio…)

(No weapons left.
No chance to loop anymore…)
